notableEvents.label: Shea Langeliers GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Shea Langeliers grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Rafael Devers. Nick Kurtz out at 2nd. Shea Langeliers out at 1st.
